Simulacao da Etapa 1 - Teste da ULA
Valores iniciais: A = 1, B = 1

Linha 1 (PC = 1):
	IR = 111110
	PC = 1
	A = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	S = 11111111111111111111111111111111 (-1)
	Vai-um = 0

Linha 2 (PC = 2):
	IR = 110101
	PC = 2
	A = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	S = 00000000000000000000000000000010 (2)
	Vai-um = 0

Linha 3 (PC = 3):
	IR = 110100
	PC = 3
	A = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	S = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Vai-um = 0

Linha 4 (PC = 4):
	IR = 011100
	PC = 4
	A = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	B = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	S = 00000000000000000000000000000001 (1)
	Vai-um = 0

Fim da simulacao da Etapa 1.
